prose:
The fukui-reactivity calculation on pyridine using DFT at the B3LYP functional with the def2-tzvp basis set (tier 'standard') in the gas phase was successfully completed. The calculation was performed with charge 0 and multiplicity 1. The method used was B3LYP/def2-TZVP, in the gas phase, with a Mulliken charge scheme included in the analysis.

The results include the most electrophilic site (atom 1) with a Fukui index of approximately 0.42010, indicating regions susceptible to electrophilic attack.

The calculation integrity is marked as trustworthy, with some warnings related to charge conservation drift, but overall the data is considered reliable. Files and visualization data are available at the specified path.
